title: Your First Match
narrativeText: Your debut match has been booked. The crowd doesn't know your name yet — but after tonight, they will. Win or lose, this is where your story starts.

choices.label: Step Into the Ring
choices.text: There is no other way forward. It's time to prove yourself.

title: Your Second Match
narrativeText: Your debut match is in the past. Let's prove last match was not a fluke! You face {{RIVAL}} again.

choices.label: Step Into the Ring
choices.text: There is no other way forward. It's time to prove yourself.

title: Your Third Match
narrativeText: You are now getting back into the rhythm. The landscape is opening up — time to prove yourself against fresh competition.

choices.label: Step Into the Ring
choices.text: There is no other way forward. It's time to prove yourself.

title: Your Fourth Match
narrativeText: Four matches in. The crowd is starting to recognise your face. Keep the momentum going.

choices.label: Step Into the Ring
choices.text: There is no other way forward. It's time to prove yourself.

title: Your Fifth Match
narrativeText: Five matches. This is your proving ground. Make it count. The current champion is {{CHAMP}} — will you be next?

choices.label: Step Into the Ring
choices.text: There is no other way forward. It's time to prove yourself.
